content.title: Upcoming Stock Splits This Week (September 16 to September 20) – Stay Invested
content.summary: These are the upcoming stock splits for the week of September 16 to September 20, based on TipRanks’ Stock Splits Calendar. A stock split is a corporate action in which the company issues additional common shares to increase the number of outstanding shares. Accordingly, the stock price of the company’s shares decreases, which maintains the market capitalization before and after the split. In contrast, there are also reverse stock splits that reduce the number of outstanding shares (consolidate)

content.title: Synopsys reports quarterly revenue below estimates, shares fall
content.summary: Chip design software provider Synopsys missed Wall Street estimates for third-quarter revenue on Tuesday, hurt by weakness in its Design IP business, sending shares down nearly 18.5% after the bell. The segment includes Synopsys' interface, security and embedded processor intellectual property, along with IP implementation services. The underperformance in the segment was caused by deals that did not materialize, largely due to new export restrictions disrupting design starts in China and challenges at a major foundry customer, CEO Sassine Ghazi said on a post-earnings call.
